data.body:
Not so.  The suburban sprawl boom delivered exactly that, enabled by a higher speed of commuting.
Build lots of units, but in small buildings -> more numerous buildings.  Cheap (close to the cost of the structure) -> a glut of developable currently-greenfield land -> speed increase.
So, flying cars?
